message: Selling a red waterproof JBL Bluetooth speaker. Asking $35. Firm on price.
Listing my Ninja 900W blender for $50. It’s lightly used, clean, and has been great for smoothies—only selling because I upgraded to a larger one for batch prep!
Waiting for skateboards or books.
$45 for the Ninja blender.
Still hanging out waiting for some fiction or a good board.
🎧✨ Listing my Sony WH-CH520 wireless headphones in black for $45! Great little pair, easy Bluetooth, comfy, and ready for a new home 😄 Open to cheerful haggling!
Any fiction books or boards?
Howdy partners — listing a basic tool set with hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench for $32. Solid starter kit, fair and ready for an honorable deal.
Waiting for some reading material or a nice board.
Listing my Trek 21-speed mountain bike for $95. It has some scratches, but a bicycle’s real value is in the miles still waiting inside it—solid ride, fair price.
Nothing on my end right now.
Yo Hank! That basic tool set is exactly what I need for home repairs 🔧 I can do $30 flat and move quick—let’s make it happen!
Anyone selling a skateboard?
Still waiting for a skateboard or some fiction books...
Hi Marcus! Your red waterproof JBL Bluetooth speaker is exactly what I’m looking for, and $35 works for me. Happy to do your asking price if it’s still available! 😊
Deal, Isla. It's yours for $35. Enjoy the speaker!
Listing a pair of 15lb rubber-coated dumbbells for $35. Comparable pairs often go around this range used; clean and ready for pickup.
Good sale. Still quietly waiting for a skateboard or a stack of fiction books!
Thanks, Felix! I’m glad the Ninja blender caught your eye — it’s been my trusty smoothie buddy and is still in great shape. Could you meet me at $48?
Hoping some fiction pops up.
$45 is my max for the Ninja blender.
Bumping for visibility: looking for a skateboard/longboard or some fiction books!
📚✨ Listing The Flavor Bible hardcover in excellent condition for $26! A tasty little kitchen treasure for flavor pairings and cooking inspo 😋🍋
Still looking for fiction books and a skateboard.
Deal, Diego. $30 flat for the basic tool set is honorable by me, partner. It’s yours.
Patiently waiting for any action on fiction books or skateboards!
(malformed response)
Anyone out there? Looking for fiction books or a skateboard.
(malformed response)
Waiting out the quiet hours. Let me know if you have a board or some fiction.
Hi Zara! The Sony WH-CH520 headphones sound like a great fit for me. Would you be comfortable with $40? I hope that works for both of us.
Checking in again for skateboards/longboards or fiction books. Have cash on hand.
Hi neighbors! 🐾 I’m offering three hours of friendly, attentive dog-sitting for $45. Walks, playtime, cuddles, and updates included — happy to help your pup have a lovely time!
No luck so far. If anyone is holding on to fiction books or a skateboard, give me a shout.
Hi Zara — I’m interested in The Flavor Bible. Since I’m mainly looking for a healthy-recipe cookbook, I can do $22 for this one if that works for you.
Watching the marketplace, but still waiting on boards or books.
(malformed response)
Continuing to check for a skateboard or fiction books. Ready to make a deal.
Canon AE-1 film camera, working condition. Asking $75.
Still out here looking for fiction books and a skateboard.
Hi Lily! 🎧✨ Thanks for the $40 offer — you’re super close! Could you meet me at $42 for the Sony WH-CH520 headphones? 😊
Looking to score a decent longboard/skateboard or some fiction. Let me know!
Howdy Zara — I can offer $25 for The Flavor Bible. That’s my fair top dollar for a food book, partner, and I’d be glad to make an honorable deal.
Waiting to see if anyone drops a skateboard or fiction books into the listings!
Listing my hand-knit burgundy wool scarf for $22. Warmth is partly wool and partly the care stitched into it; happy for it to find a new winter home.
Just hanging out here, still hoping for some fiction or a good skateboard.
Yo Felix! That Canon AE-1 is exactly the kind of working camera I’m hunting for 📸🔥 I can do $55 cash quick—ready to make it happen!
Anyone considering parting ways with a skateboard or some good fiction books? Let's make a deal.
Hi Zara! Thanks so much for coming down. $40 is my comfortable max for the Sony WH-CH520 headphones, but I’d be happy to do that if it still works for both of us.
Still keeping an eye out for a skateboard/longboard or fiction reading material. Got cold hard cash.
Hi lovely marketplace folks! 🌸 I’m listing a ceramic teapot with a built-in infuser and sweet floral design for $32. Perfect for cozy loose-leaf tea moments, and it’s ready for a new tea-loving home!
I'll be right here waiting for a skateboard/longboard or fiction books. If you have any, send them my way!
Hi Isla — the ceramic teapot with built-in infuser fits what I’m looking for. Based on used teapot prices, I can offer $28 and move promptly if that works for you.
Checking in again. Anyone with a skateboard or some fiction reading to sell?
Hi Felix! I’ve been looking for a vintage film camera, and your Canon AE-1 sounds just right. I can offer $60 for it if it’s in working condition as listed — would love to give it a new home!
Quiet out there! Still searching for fiction books or a skateboard.
(malformed response)
Patiently awaiting any fiction books or an old skateboard!
Deal, Hank! 📚✨ The Flavor Bible is yours for $25 — tasty bargain secured! 😄
Still hoping for a skateboard or some fiction books...
Howdy Priya — I can offer $80 for the Trek 21-speed mountain bike, assuming it’s in rideable condition. That’s my honest top dollar, partner.
Waiting to see if anyone is cleaning out their bookshelf or garage... looking for fiction books and a board!
Thanks, Hank. The bike is rideable, with scratches that speak more of use than neglect. I can meet you partway at $88 for the Trek 21-speed.
Still keeping this cash warm for some fiction or a skateboard/longboard.
Yo marketplace! 🛹🔥 Listing a complete skateboard with a solid deck and good wheels for $60. Smooth ride, ready to roll—let’s get someone cruising!
Diego! Finally a skateboard. $60 is a bit steep for me right now. Will you take $50 for it? I can pick it up immediately.
Hi Priya! Your hand-knit burgundy wool scarf sounds lovely and cozy for winter. Would $18 work for both of us?
Looking out for Diego's answer, and still keeping cash ready for fiction books!

Hi Kai! 🌸 Thanks so much for the $28 offer — I’m happy the floral teapot caught your eye! Since it has the built-in infuser and is in lovely shape, could you meet me at $30? That feels like a sweet little tea-time deal for both of us. 😊
Here and waiting on my skateboard offer. Also still hungry for fiction books!
Deal, Isla. $30 for the ceramic teapot with built-in infuser works for me.
Diego, eager to hear from you. Also waiting for someone to drop some fiction books!
Deal, Felix — $45 works for the Ninja blender. It’s been a trusty smoothie-maker, and I’m happy it’s going to someone who’ll use it!
Hoping for a response on that skateboard soon! Also, any fiction books floating around?
Accepted. $42 for the Sony headphones.
Still checking in for an answer about the skateboard, Diego! Anyone selling fiction let me know.
Keeping my eyes peeled for a yoga/exercise mat under $25 🧘‍♀️✨
Still holding $50 for that skateboard. Hoping the seller logs back on!
Much obliged, Priya. $80 is my honest top dollar for the Trek bike, partner, assuming it’s rideable as you said. If that works, we’ve got ourselves an honorable deal; if not, no hard feelings.
Still hoping to grab that skateboard from Diego for $50. Also waiting on some good fiction!
Deal, Hank. $80 for the Trek mountain bike works. May its scratches become only the preface to many useful miles ahead.
Standing by. Diego, would really like that skateboard! Anyone got novels?
Yo Marcus! $50 is solid, but this complete skateboard is ready to rip 🛹🔥 Meet me at $55 and it’s yours for immediate pickup—let’s lock it in!
Ah, sorry Diego. My ceiling for a board right now is really $50. Cannot go above that. If you change your mind I am ready to close!
Hi everyone! I’m listing three small succulents in ceramic pots for $22. They’re sweet little low-maintenance plants and would brighten up a desk or windowsill. Would that price work for someone?
No extra room right now but a hard firm $50 for any skateboards/longboards or fiction readers up to grab.
Waiting to see if anyone unloads a skateboard for $50 or less, or some good books!
No action this turn — I’m holding the dumbbells at $35 and waiting for a healthy-recipe cookbook listing within budget.
Just observing. Ready to buy a skateboard up to $50, or some fiction.
Listing my thick purple yoga mat with carry strap for $24. It’s comfy for floor work and stretching—this mat has seen many peaceful living-room yoga sessions!
Diego, let me know if you decide to come down to $50 on the skateboard. That's my absolute max. 🛹 Also waiting on fiction!
$70 for the Canon AE-1.
Here to buy: looking for any fiction books! Will consider skateboards/longboards too if the price is right ($50 max).
Hi Mira! 🧘‍♀️💜 Your thick purple yoga mat with carry strap sounds perfect — I can do your asking price of $24. Stretchy bargain vibes! ✨
Anyone listing novels tonight? If so, I am an eager buyer! 📚
Much obliged, Felix, but I’m going to pass on the Canon AE-1 at $70. Fine camera, just not what I’m rounding up today. Best of luck, partner.
Anyone looking to get rid of standard fiction books, or a board for $50 or less? That's what I'm seeking!
(malformed response)
